holdings.infoBox: IAI is an equity ETF with a total of 39 individual holdings. The top holdings are The Goldman Sachs Group stock at N/A, Morgan Stanley at N/A, The Charles Schwab Corporation at N/A, Robinhood Markets at N/A, and Moody's at N/A.

overview.description: The iShares U.S. Broker-Dealers & Securities Exchanges ETF (IAI) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the DJ US Select / Investment Services index, a market-cap-weighted index of investment service providers as well as securities and commodities exchanges. IAI was launched on May 1, 2006 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: Why these ETF bets in stocks and bonds may pay off in 2025, according to BlackRock
data.text: Heading into 2025, ETF investors appeared enthusiastic about prospects for the U.S. bull market to keep running.

data.title: Israel Is Going To Market Its Weapons Systems In The United Arab Emirates
data.text: In a historic first, Israel will market the various military hardware and technology it has to offer for export in the United Arab Emirates.
